category_sources: source_facts.description says mscgen parses Message Sequence Chart descriptions and produces images; official homepage describes Mscgen as a Message Sequence Chart renderer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mscgen; official homepage title uses Mscgen.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best documentation surface supplied; it includes downloads, development source notes, bugs, Doxygen integration, and usage material.
repo_sources: Official homepage says development sources are available on Google Code and can be browsed or retrieved with anonymous SVN access; Google Code is historical/archived, so confidence is medium.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Message Sequence Chart image generation; official homepage notes Doxygen integration and image output/downloads.
